meta.title: Hong Kong RWA Ecosystem Map
meta.description: 6-layer structured overview: Regulatory → Institutions → Infrastructure → Issuance → Market Access → Enablers
meta.disclaimer: This map is compiled from publicly available official sources. Participant lists may be incomplete where information has not been publicly enumerated by regulators. This is an informational reference, not a regulatory register.
sources: Company public filings and press releases

layers.label: Regulatory Oversight
layers.description: Primary regulators governing tokenized assets, stablecoins, and virtual asset platforms in Hong Kong.

participants.name: HKMA
participants.role: Monetary authority; stablecoin licensing under Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656); EnsembleTX initiator

participants.name: SFC
participants.role: VATP licensing; tokenized securities regulation; Type 1/7/9 licensing for RWA intermediaries

participants.name: HKEx
participants.role: Operator of securities and derivatives exchanges; exploring tokenized bond infrastructure

layers.label: Financial Institutions
layers.description: Licensed stablecoin issuers and traditional banks active in RWA tokenization in Hong Kong.

participants.name: HSBC
participants.role: Licensed HKD stablecoin issuer; first bank to receive stablecoin licence under Cap. 656

participants.name: Anchorpoint Financial
participants.full_name: Anchorpoint Financial (Standard Chartered + Animoca Brands + HKT)
participants.role: Licensed stablecoin issuer; consortium of Standard Chartered, Animoca Brands, and HKT

participants.name: Bank of China (HK)
participants.role: Active in mBridge CBDC trials and EnsembleTX wCBDC settlement

participants.name: Hang Seng Bank
participants.role: Exploring tokenized asset custody and digital securities services

participants.name: ZA Bank
participants.role: First HK virtual bank to offer crypto trading services; exploring stablecoin integration

participants.name: Fusion Bank
participants.role: Virtual bank exploring stablecoin and digital asset integration

layers.applicants_note: 8 total stablecoin applicants in review as of May 2026; includes Ant Group and ICBC Asia. Remaining applicants not yet publicly identified by HKMA.

layers.label: Infrastructure
layers.description: Core infrastructure: HKMA EnsembleTX wCBDC settlement project (launched 13 Nov 2025), institutional-grade custody solutions, and blockchain networks underpinning HK RWA issuance.

participants.name: HKMA
participants.role: Initiator and operator of EnsembleTX; wCBDC issuer for settlement trials

participants.name: BIS Innovation Hub
participants.full_name: BIS Innovation Hub Hong Kong Centre
participants.role: Technical partner; cross-border settlement research

participants.name: HSBC
participants.role: Commercial bank participant; tokenized trade finance and bond settlement trials

participants.name: Standard Chartered
participants.role: Commercial bank participant; trade finance tokenization

participants.name: Bank of China (HK)
participants.role: Commercial bank participant; cross-border CBDC settlement trials

participants.name: BlackRock
participants.role: Asset manager participant; tokenized money market fund settlement trials

participants.name: Franklin Templeton
participants.role: Asset manager participant; tokenized fund infrastructure trials

participants.name: HashKey Custody
participants.role: SFC-regulated digital asset custodian; institutional-grade safekeeping for tokenized assets

participants.name: OSL Custody
participants.role: SFC-licensed custody under OSL Group; serves institutional clients holding tokenized RWAs

layers.participants_note: 10 EnsembleTX institutions total as disclosed by HKMA (7 publicly named). Custodians listed hold SFC Type 1/7 licences with custody provisions.

layers.label: Issuance Platforms
layers.description: Platforms and protocols enabling tokenization of bonds, real estate, funds, and other assets, with direct Hong Kong regulatory nexus or issued by HK-regulated entities.

participants.name: HKSAR Digital Green Bond
participants.role: World's first government tokenized green bond (2023); settled on distributed ledger under HKMA oversight

participants.name: XGT
participants.role: Tokenized gold backed by HSBC vaulted gold bars; regulated under HKMA stablecoin framework

participants.name: ChinaAMC HKD MMF
participants.full_name: ChinaAMC HKD Digital Money Market Fund
participants.role: Tokenized HKD money market fund; part of EnsembleTX pilot use cases

participants.name: BUIDL
participants.full_name: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund
participants.role: Largest tokenized Treasury fund; BlackRock participates in EnsembleTX; RARM-assessed

participants.name: BENJI
participants.full_name: Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund (BENJI)
participants.role: Tokenized U.S. government money fund; Franklin Templeton participates in EnsembleTX

participants.name: Liquefy
participants.role: HK-based tokenization platform for real estate and private equity; STO structuring and issuance

participants.name: Synpulse
participants.role: Technology provider supporting tokenized HK government green bond issuance

participants.name: ADDX
participants.role: Singapore-headquartered private markets exchange with HK operations; tokenized bond and fund issuance

layers.label: Market Access
layers.description: SFC-licensed Virtual Asset Trading Platforms (VATPs) and intermediaries providing HK retail and institutional investors access to tokenized assets and virtual assets.

participants.name: OSL Exchange
participants.role: First SFC-licensed VATP; institutional and retail virtual asset trading

participants.name: HashKey Exchange
participants.role: SFC-licensed VATP; retail and professional investor trading; Hong Kong-headquartered

participants.name: Victory Securities
participants.role: Traditional broker-dealer that received SFC VATP licence; extends digital asset services to existing client base

participants.name: Bullish
participants.role: SFC-licensed VATP; institutional-focused exchange with HK operations

participants.name: Futu Holdings
participants.role: HK-licensed broker-dealer offering crypto trading services via licensed partnerships

layers.participants_note: 12 VATPs licensed as of February 2026; 4 publicly confirmed with detailed profiles. Remaining licencees listed on SFC register without full public disclosure.

layers.label: Professional Enablers
layers.description: KYC/AML analytics providers, law firms, and audit practices that underpin regulatory compliance, transaction structuring, and assurance for the HK RWA ecosystem.

participants.name: Chainalysis
participants.role: Blockchain analytics and AML investigation platform; used by HK regulators and licensed VATPs for compliance screening

participants.name: Elliptic
participants.role: Crypto AML/KYC compliance solution; serves licensed VATPs and financial institutions in Hong Kong

participants.name: Mayer Brown
participants.role: Leading legal practice for digital asset structuring, tokenized securities, and stablecoin regulatory advice in HK

participants.name: King & Wood Mallesons
participants.role: Advised on multiple HK tokenization projects; specialises in cross-border China–HK digital asset structures

participants.name: Deacons
participants.role: HK-based law firm advising on VATP licensing, STO structuring, and fintech regulatory compliance

participants.name: PwC Hong Kong
participants.role: Digital asset audit and advisory practice; reserve verification, SOC 2 for crypto exchanges

participants.name: Deloitte Hong Kong
participants.role: Blockchain assurance and digital asset advisory; audit of tokenized asset structures

participants.name: KPMG Hong Kong
participants.role: Fintech and digital asset advisory; regulatory compliance and technology risk assessment

layers.participants_note: Professional service providers listed are active in HK digital asset engagements based on public disclosures. This list is illustrative, not exhaustive.

gaps.title: Oracle Infrastructure Undisclosed
gaps.description: Public documentation on price oracle providers (e.g., Chainlink or equivalent) deployed within EnsembleTX is limited. HKMA has not enumerated oracle partners.

gaps.title: No Licensed Carbon Credit Tokenization
gaps.description: Unlike Singapore (Climate Impact X), Hong Kong lacks a licensed platform for tokenizing carbon credits. Climate-related RWA structuring remains nascent.

gaps.title: Limited Retail Access to Tokenized RWAs
gaps.description: Licensed VATPs primarily serve professional or institutional investors. Retail investors have minimal direct access to tokenized real-world assets beyond VATP-listed tokens.

gaps.title: No Local Digital Asset Rating Agency
gaps.description: Hong Kong lacks a dedicated digital asset credit or quality rating agency. Risk assessment relies on international firms without HK-specific RWA methodology.

gaps.title: Stablecoin Sandbox Participants Undisclosed
gaps.description: HKMA has not published the full list of sandbox participants. 6 of 8 applicants have not been publicly identified.
